goals.title: Fix Chat Input Routing
goals.description: Address the low-confidence routing failure where chat inputs fail to reach handlers.
goals.success_criteria: Chat inputs are correctly routed to general_chat or appropriate tools.
goals.verification_method: Verify BitNetRouter logs correct handler dispatch for test chat inputs.

goals.title: Restore Wizard and Intent Planning
goals.description: Fix the 'openexec wizard' and intent planning logic so intent.md files can be generated and stories can be imported.
goals.success_criteria: Wizard runs successfully, generates a valid intent.md, and stories are imported without failure.
goals.verification_method: Run 'openexec wizard' and verify intent.md generation and subsequent 'openexec import' success.

goals.title: Stabilize Self-Healing and CI/CD
goals.description: Fix the regression in self-healing loops and ensure all existing CI/CD tests pass.
goals.success_criteria: CI/CD pipeline returns to green and agent loops successfully recover from simulated errors.
goals.verification_method: Execute 'make test' and verify 100% pass rate in internal/dcp/ healing tests.

stories.title: Project Goal Validation
stories.description: As a maintainer, I want to verify all primary goals via E2E testing to ensure the system is production-ready.
acceptance_criteria: Wizard, Router, and Healing goals (G-001, G-002, G-003) are verified via E2E tests.

stories.title: Discovery and Legacy System Audit
stories.description: As a developer, I want to map the existing environment and API surface area so that I can safely restore the system without breaking legacy compatibility.
acceptance_criteria: Environment variables and dependencies are extracted.
Existing API surface area is mapped for Wizard, Stories, DCP, and Router.
Local buildability of the legacy state is verified.

stories.title: Core CLI Architecture Restoration
stories.description: As a user, I want a functional CLI that works across macOS, Linux, and Windows so that I can use OpenExec on any platform.
acceptance_criteria: CLI binary builds for macOS, Linux, and Windows.
Core command entry points (wizard, import, run) respond correctly.

stories.title: Engine Restoration and Logic Fixes
stories.description: As a user, I want the Wizard, Story Manager, Router, and Healing loops to work correctly so that I can automate complex tasks reliably.
acceptance_criteria: Wizard generates valid intent.md and imports stories.
Self-healing loops stabilize with exit strategy C-003.
Docker containers start successfully and pass health checks.
stories.contract: Engine Interface Contract (Wizard, Story, Router, Healing)
